title: Rosapoo Ravikkaikari Lyrics Jigina
stanzas:
Rosapoo ravikka kaari
rasathi stella mary
soakkaana en singaari
sonnaale enakku sorry.  (2)

colorful-a kavidhai koori
therinjene hero maari
irudhum en kaalai vaari
ponaale idhu en story

kanni ava enna pakka
kamaraja vazhnthaenga
pinne ava tata kaatta
devadaasaa aanenga

Rosapoo ravikka kaari
rasathi stella mary
soakkaana en singaari
sonnaale enakku sorry

rettavalam chainu kettaale
naan vaangi poga
vairathula thodum keattaale

attigaiyum anbaa kaettaale
naan vaangipoga
oththa kallu jimikki kaettaale

ava kaettathu ellaam vaangi
nidham koduthavan aanen bondi
ava sirippula mayangiya
piragu naan oattaandi.

Rosapoo ravikka kaari
rasathi stella mary
soakkaana en singaari
sonnaale enakku sorry

cutticura powderu kettaale
naan vangi poga
pottapulla perfume kaettaale

anaarkali chudithar kaettaale
naan vaangi poga
kanchipuram podava kaettaale

ava paathadha ellaam kaatti
enna paduthi ponaa vaatti
ava irukkura theruvaiyum
koluththanum thee mootti

Rosapoo ravikka kaari
rasathi stella mary
soakkaana en singaari
sonnaale enakku sorry.  (2)

colorful-a kavidhai koori
therinjene hero maari
irudhum en kaalai vaari
ponaale idhu en story

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Rosapoo Ravikkaikari expresses themes of love and romance, showcasing the playful dynamics between lovers.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Jigina, this song highlights a pivotal moment of joy and connection between the lead characters, enhancing the romantic narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Hariharasudhan and composed by John Peters.

When was the song released?

Rosapoo Ravikkaikari was released on August 21, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Rosapoo Ravikkaikari, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the playful and romantic interactions between the characters in Jigina. The lyrics convey a sense of youthful exuberance and affection, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations of love. With its catchy melody and lively beats, the song evokes feelings of joy and nostalgia. This track stands out as a delightful addition to the film's soundtrack, encapsulating the essence of romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rosapoo Ravikkaikari from Jigina is a vibrant celebration of love that captures the essence of youthful romance. With Hariharasudhan's captivating vocals and John Peters' lively composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the colorful world of this track and let its infectious energy take you on a joyful ride!
stanzaMeanings: The rose flower is blooming, and my beloved Stella Mary is saying sorry to me.
I understood the colorful poetry, and the hero is changing. When my morning comes, this is my story.
She is looking at me, and I am living like Kamaraja. Later, she shows her father, who is a god.
I have understood in the end; now, they want love.
The rose flower is blooming, and my beloved Stella Mary is saying sorry to me.
When I bought the chain of the two-headed snake, it started to move when I touched it.
When I heard about the beauty and love, I wanted to buy it. When I heard about the single stone earring, I wanted to buy it too.
Whatever she asked, I gave it all. After she smiled, I was lost in her laughter.
I have understood in the end; the girls are showing off.
The rose flower is blooming, and my beloved Stella Mary is saying sorry to me.
When I heard about the cuticura powder, I wanted to buy it. When I heard about the perfume, I wanted to buy it too.
When I heard about the Anarkali dress, I wanted to buy it. When I heard about the Kanchipuram saree, I wanted to buy it too.
Whatever she showed me, I was captivated. If she was upset, I would clean the street where she was.
I have understood in the end; the girls are at four twenty.
The rose flower is blooming, and my beloved Stella Mary is saying sorry to me.
I understood the colorful poetry, and the hero is changing. When my morning comes, this is my story.
